# Accepted Cards

Acme Shop accepts several payment methods including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit and debit cards. Additionally, customers can use PayPal and Apple Pay during checkout. While prepaid gift cards bearing a major network are accepted, virtual single-use card numbers are not accepted as they cannot be authorized for the deferred capture in the order processing flow.

[Source: payment_methods.md#accepted-cards]
